description: Canadian outlaw motorcycle club based in Greater Montreal, founded in late 1965. It was briefly the most powerful motorcycle gang in Montreal before disbanding in January 1976 after a biker war with the Popeyes. The club engaged in drug trafficking, intimidation, assault, and murder, and was known for its assassination attempt on singer Johnny Hallyday.

country_links.evidence_quote: there was also a one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club in Boston which had exactly the same name and spelling as the Canadian club. Unlike those other clubs mentioned, however, the Canadian and Boston groups maintained a close friendship with one another.
country_links.context: The Devil's Disciples MC of Quebec maintained a close friendship with a similarly named one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club in Boston.
